basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Senior Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 05 Senior Surveyor Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official GSSSB website. The last date to submit the application form is 24-05-2026. In this article, you’ll find the GSSSB Senior Surveyor Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

application_fee.payment_mode: Online (Debit Card / Net Banking / UPI / Wallet)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 45 Years Age as on: 03-03-2026 Age Relaxation: General: 35 years; PwD General Male: +10 years (45); PwD General Female: +15 years (45); PwD Reserved Male: +15 years (45); PwD Reserved Female: +20 years (45)

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in relevant discipline, BCA, B.Sc. IT
qualification.details: Candidates must have Bachelor of Engineering/Technology in Civil/Architecture/Computer/Information Technology/Computer Science/Electronics & Communication/Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication OR Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) OR B.Sc. in Information Technology + Basic computer knowledge certificate + Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 40,800/- to Rs. 92,300/- Per Month Pay Scale: Fixed for first 5 years, then Pay Matrix Level-5 (₹29,200 – 92,300)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GSSSB Senior Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 can follow the steps below.
Click on the recruitment / career section
Find the notification for Senior Surveyor, Class-3 posts
Fill in the online application form with correct details
Take a printout of the application for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is the total vacancy for GSSSB Senior Surveyor Class-3 2026?
faq.answer: The total vacancies for GSSSB Senior Surveyor, Class-3 2026 is 5 posts under special recruitment drive for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities. The breakdown is 3 posts for Deaf & Hard of Hearing (Group B) and 2 posts for Autism, Intellectual Disability etc (Group D). These are in Revenue Department, Settlement Commissioner & Superintendent of Land Records office.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Senior Surveyor 2026?
faq.answer: The online application last date for GSSSB Senior Surveyor Class-3 is 24-05-2026 (23:59 hrs). Applications start from 16-02-2026 (17:00 hrs) via OJAS portal.

faq.question: Q3. What are the qualifications required for GSSSB Senior Surveyor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess BE/B.Tech in Civil, Architecture, Computer, IT, CS, Electronics & Comm, Electronics, Electronics & Telecomm, or BCA or B.Sc. IT as on 15-02-2026. Additionally, basic computer knowledge certificate and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for GSSSB Senior Surveyor 2026?
faq.answer: Application fee is ₹500/- for Unreserved/General category and ₹400/- for Reserved categories, all PwD, Women, and Ex-servicemen. The fee is refundable to those who appear in the exam and payable online via Debit Card, Net Banking, UPI, or Wallet.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for GSSSB Senior Surveyor Class-3?
faq.answer: Selection is through a single stage written examination (Objective MCQ) of 210 marks, 180 minutes duration, computer based or OMR. It has Part A (90 marks: Reasoning, Quant, Constitution/Current Affairs) and Part B (120 marks: Technical). Qualifying 40% in each part separately.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for GSSSB Senior Surveyor post?
faq.answer: Initial fixed salary is ₹40,800/- per month for first 5 years. After satisfactory service, regular appointment in Pay Matrix Level-5: ₹29,200 – 92,300 per month, subject to Finance Dept resolutions.

faq.question: Q7. What are the age limits for GSSSB Senior Surveyor 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum age is 18 years for all. Maximum age as on 03-03-2026: General 35 years; PwD General Male 45 (+10), Female 45 (+15); PwD Reserved Male 45 (+15), Female 45 (+20). Only Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (Groups B & D) can apply.
